    <item>
        <guid>nba529478</guid>
        <title>Draymond Green: Ejected in season-ending loss</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/draymond-green-3299</link>
        <description>Green was ejected with 1:04 remaining in the fourth quarter of Friday's 111-96 Play-In Tournament loss to the Suns after fouling out at the 1:06 mark. He closed with five points (2-4 FG, 0-2 3Pt, 1-2 FT), six assists, two rebounds and one steal across 36 minutes.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Fri, 17 Apr 2026 10:03:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529477</guid>
        <title>Devin Booker: Tossed Friday</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/devin-booker-3711</link>
        <description>Booker was ejected with 1:04 remaining in the fourth quarter of Friday's 111-96 Play-In Tournament win over the Warriors. He finished with 20 points (5-12 FG, 0-4 3Pt, 10-10 FT), eight assists, six rebounds and one steal across 42 minutes.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Fri, 17 Apr 2026 9:54:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529476</guid>
        <title>Paolo Banchero: Scores game-high 25 points in win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/paolo-banchero-5700</link>
        <description>Banchero registered 25 points (9-17 FG, 2-6 3Pt, 5-8 FT), five rebounds, six assists, two steals and one block over 33 minutes during Friday's 121-90 Play-In Tournament win over the Hornets.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Fri, 17 Apr 2026 7:35:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529475</guid>
        <title>LaMelo Ball: Paces Charlotte in blowout loss</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/lamelo-ball-5151</link>
        <description>Ball contributed 23 points (7-17 FG, 3-8 3Pt, 6-6 FT), five assists and two rebounds across 25 minutes in Friday's 121-90 Play-In Tournament loss to the Magic.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Fri, 17 Apr 2026 7:33:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529473</guid>
        <title>Grayson Allen: Available Friday</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/grayson-allen-4454</link>
        <description>Allen (hamstring) is available for Friday's Play-In Tournament game against the Warriors.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Fri, 17 Apr 2026 6:20:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
